senses.definition: the way that someone or something looks

examples.x: Despite her tiredness, she maintained a polished appearance for the important event.
Her appearance has changed over the years, but she still retains her natural beauty.
She pays attention to her appearance, making sure her hair and makeup are perfect.
She was nervous about her appearance before the job interview.
The fashion show featured models of different appearances, showcasing diversity.

senses.definition: having features or characteristics that are pleasing

examples.x: Her confident and friendly personality makes her very attractive to others.
She wears an attractive outfit that catches everyone's attention at the party.
The charismatic singer has an attractive voice that captivates the audience.
The handsome actor's attractive smile made him a heartthrob for many fans.
The professor is not only knowledgeable but also has an attractive way of presenting complex ideas.

senses.definition: possessing an attractive and pleasing appearance

examples.x: He's a good-looking fellow with a charming smile that brightens up his face.
She met a good-looking guy at the party, and they hit it off instantly.
The good-looking waitress served us with a friendly smile.
The handsome young man caught the attention of everyone in the room with his good-looking appearance.
The new actor in the movie is very good-looking, and many people admire his appearance.

senses.definition: (of a man) having an attractive face and body

examples.x: He is a handsome man with a strong jawline and neatly styled hair.
She couldn't help but blush when the handsome stranger asked for her name.
She was excited to introduce her handsome fiancé to her family.
She thought her husband looked especially handsome in his suit.
The handsome professor had a warm smile that made students feel at ease.

senses.definition: visually pleasing in a charming way

examples.x: The girl's pretty eyes reflect her kindness and warmth.
The little girl had a pretty smile that melted hearts.
The woman had a pretty and delicate voice that was pleasant to listen to.
With her pretty eyes and friendly manner, she makes friends easily.

senses.definition: attractive and good-looking

examples.x: She wore a cute, colorful dress to the party.
The cartoon characters in the movie were cute.
The cute boy had curly hair that framed his face.
The cute girl had big, expressive eyes and a button nose.
The little girl's cute giggle brightened everyone's day.

senses.definition: (of hair) having a spiral-like pattern

examples.x: Curly hair can be easy to manage with the right products and care.
I love the look of curly hair; it's so charming and unique.
In the summer, her curly hair tends to get frizzy because of the humidity.
My friend has beautiful curly hair that bounces when she walks.
The baby's curly hair was adorable and attracted lots of attention.

senses.definition: (of hair) having a slight curl or wave to it, creating a soft and gentle appearance

examples.x: In the morning, she brushes her wavy hair to remove tangles.
The actress styled her wavy hair in loose waves for the movie premiere.
The little girl's wavy hair danced in the breeze as she played outside.
The model's wavy hair framed her face in a soft and flattering way.

senses.definition: (of hair) not curly or wavy

examples.x: He brushed his straight hair before leaving for work.
He prefers to keep his straight hair short for easy maintenance.
The boy's straight hair didn't require much styling; it always looked neat.
The little girl's straight hair was easy to comb in the morning.
The woman's straight hair reflected the light, giving it a glossy appearance.

senses.definition: relating to men or the male gender

examples.x: He accessorized with a trendy male cap for a casual look.
His male features include a square jaw and broad shoulders.
The male jacket he wears is stylish and fitted.
The male jeans he chose were comfortable and fashionable.
The male socks he wore were comfortable and kept his feet warm.

senses.definition: relating to women or the female gender

examples.x: She chose a vibrant and feminine female blouse for the special occasion.
She wore a stylish and elegant female dress to the party.
The organization focuses on addressing issues specific to the female workforce, such as equal pay and workplace discrimination.
Female empowerment initiatives aim to address gender disparities and promote equality in various sectors, including education and the workforce.

senses.definition: (of hair) pale yellow or gold in color

examples.x: Her blond hair caught the sunlight and gleamed like gold.
She had a pretty blond braid that rested on her shoulder.
The actress wore a cute headband to keep her blond hair out of her face.
The little girl's face lit up with a big smile, showcasing her blond curls.
The model's stunning blue eyes complemented her natural blond hair.

senses.definition: having little or no hair on the head

examples.x: He used a special shampoo to try to prevent becoming completely bald.
By the time he was 40, he had gone completely bald.
The bald man wore a hat to protect his head from the sun.
His head became completely bald after years of shaving it clean.
The older gentleman had a neat and tidy bald head, which suited him well.

senses.definition: thin in an attractive way

examples.x: He followed a healthy diet to stay slim and healthy.
She has a slim and graceful posture.
She has a slim figure and always looks elegant in her outfits.
The slim dancer moved with grace and precision.
The slim model walked confidently on the runway.

senses.definition: having a very low amount of body fat

examples.x: She has always been naturally skinny, even though she eats well.
She preferred wearing loose clothing to hide her skinny frame.

senses.definition: healthy and strong, especially due to regular physical exercise or balanced diet

examples.x: After months of training, he finally feels fit enough to compete in the marathon.
Doctors often recommend regular exercise and a healthy diet to stay fit and prevent illness.
He exercises regularly, so he's very fit and full of energy.
My grandfather is in his 70s, but he's still very fit and active.
She follows a balanced diet, and her doctor says she's very fit.

senses.definition: extremely small

examples.x: He found a tiny seashell on the beach.
She had a tiny scar on her knee from a childhood accident.
The tiny ants worked together to carry a big crumb.
The tiny bubbles floated to the surface of the sparkling water.
The tiny kitten fit comfortably in the palm of her hand.

senses.definition: the hair that grow on the chin and sides of a man’s face

examples.x: He decided to grow a beard for the first time to change his appearance.
He trimmed his beard to keep it neat and tidy.
The old man had a long, white beard that flowed down to his chest.
The stylish hipster had a perfectly groomed beard.
The thick beard made him look more mature and distinguished.

senses.definition: hair that grows or left to grow above the upper lip

examples.x: He decided to grow a mustache to change his appearance.
The actor's mustache was a key feature of his character in the movie.
The comedian made funny faces, twirling his mustache for laughs.
The gentleman's thick mustache gave him a distinguished look.
The painter's curly mustache added to his eccentric personality.

senses.definition: to use a tool to arrange or tidy up your hair

examples.x: She brushes her hair every morning to make it smooth and neat.
He brushes his hair before leaving the house to remove tangles and create a polished look.
He brushes his daughter's hair gently to remove knots and tangles.
They brush their pet's fur regularly to keep it clean and free of mats.
The stylist brushes the client's hair to achieve the desired style.

senses.definition: an expression in which our mouth curves upwards, when we are being friendly or are happy or amused

examples.x: A simple smile can make a big difference in someone's day.
He greeted us with a warm and genuine smile.
Her smile brightened up the room, spreading joy to everyone around.
The baby's innocent smile melted our hearts.
The couple exchanged loving smiles as they danced together.

senses.definition: to have a particular appearance or give a particular impression

examples.x: The boss looked pleased with the team's performance.
The cake looks delicious.
The children looked happy playing in the park.

senses.definition: to give details about someone or something to say what they are like

examples.x: He used metaphors to describe the power of nature in his poem.
She described her feelings of excitement before the big event.
The artist used vivid colors to describe the sunset in her painting.
The guide described the historical significance of the ancient ruins.
The scientist used graphs and charts to describe the research findings.

senses.definition: to seem as if someone or something is being or doing a particular thing

examples.x: She appears upset about something, judging by the frown on her face.
The new employee appeared nervous during the interview.
He appears to be lost, looking around and checking his phone for directions.
The cat appears to be hungry, meowing loudly and rubbing against its food bowl.
Based on the evidence, it appears the suspect was at the scene of the crime.
From their body language, it appears they are in a deep conversation.

senses.definition: to make something visible or noticeable

examples.x: Did you show your new painting to your art teacher?
Have you shown your design concepts to the client?
If there are any pictures from the event, please show them to the attendees.
They were shown a documentary about wildlife conservation.
You need to show them your ID to pass the security checkpoint.

senses.definition: to keep something in a secret place, preventing it from being seen

examples.x: She hid her diary in a secret drawer to keep it private.
The detective carefully hides the evidence to protect the case.
She hid the gift under her bed to keep it a surprise.
They hid the keys in a drawer so no one would find them.
She tried to hide her surprise when she received the unexpected gift.

senses.definition: being the one that is different, extra, or not included
(of two or more things) having qualities in common that are not exactly the same

examples.x: He discovered that the two restaurants had similar menus, offering a variety of international cuisine.
He found two similar shirts in different colors, deciding to buy both.
The two cars had similar features, both having leather seats and a sunroof.
The two friends had similar tastes in music, enjoying the same bands and artists.
The two sisters had similar hairstyles, both wearing their hair in braids.
